description_long: This kiosk is a small, standalone structure with a modern, minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and light blue surfaces. The kiosk is enclosed by a perimeter fence with vertical slats and a solid lower section, and it sits on a paved platform bordered by a dark strip that resembles a road or sidewalk. The main kiosk booth is hexagonal with large window panels on three sides, providing visibility and interaction with the outside. There is a single entry gate integrated into the fence, adjacent to the booth, and the rest of the enclosure is solid, offering privacy and security. The roof of the kiosk is flat and slightly overhangs the booth, while the surrounding fence and platform create a defined boundary. No signage or decorative elements are visible, emphasizing the utilitarian and functional nature of the structure.
description: A modern, hexagonal kiosk booth with large windows, surrounded by a light blue and white fence on a paved platform. The structure is clean, minimalist, and designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal kiosk booth, large windows, entry gate, and the full extent of the surrounding fence and paved platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk booth, the thickness of the fence, and the paved area adjacent to the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the fence enclosure and the kiosk booth's rear wall, with minimal window exposure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the fence, the booth's side profile, and the paved area next to the road.
attribute_window_presence: Three large rectangular windows on the front and angled sides of the kiosk booth.
attribute_door_configuration: Single door integrated into the fence adjacent to the booth.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight overhang, constructed from solid material, no visible decorative elements.
